Ensure all content is accessible to users with disabilities according to WCAG guidelines.
Regularly test and audit website for broken links and fix them promptly.
Implement responsive design to ensure optimal user experience on all devices.
Provide text alternatives for non-text content like images and videos.
Use descriptive link text that clearly indicates the destination.
Ensure keyboard accessibility for users who rely on keyboard navigation.
Design with color contrast in mind for users with visual impairments.
Enable users to skip repetitive content through proper skip navigation techniques.
Implement ARIA landmarks to help screen readers navigate the site efficiently.
Conduct usability testing with users of diverse abilities to identify and address accessibility issues.
